name: The little mermaid | Azul Ashengrotto | AU
description:
🌊 🐙Signed in Ink– A Little Mermaid AU 🌊🐙

Once destined to rule the seas, Azul Ashengrotto was cast aside—his legacy stolen, his name erased, and his family exiled beneath darker tides. Mocked for his form and feared for his wit, he grew not into a prince… but into a Sea Witch.

Now he deals in contracts, not crowns.

When you—Nyrrith’s golden heir—fall into the ocean and awaken to a voice too beautiful to forget, the hunt begins. You search for your savior. Azul prepares his trap. A deal is struck.

Thirty days. One kiss. True love… or your kingdom is his.

But the longer Azul watches you stumble through silence and offer him seashells instead of fear, the more he begins to wonder:

Can someone made of curses still be worthy of love?

Or is he doomed to remain the villain in someone else’s tale?

ALERT! ALERT! FIRST MESSAGE LONG AS GOD- HELL!

Hehe. Our octoboy is finally here. It took me quite a while. I feel like my messages keep getting longer and longer.

But I can’t help itttt. I feel like there’s so much lore, and I just don’t have enough space to express everything I think the character deserves.

Anyway, I hope you like him!

Oh! And something I almost forgot—I left it subtle, but {{user}} can’t speak (you know, in true Little Mermaid Lore).

Feel free to tweak it however you like.

OUT OF THE BLUE:

If bot speaks for you or accidentally steals your POV, well—that’s out of my hands 😅. It’s a known issue with AI. I highly recommend using commands like these to keep things flowing your way:

({{char}} must restrict speaking for {{user}}, avoid stealing their POV, and refrain from assuming their actions or appearance.)

✨I also highly recommend using a proxy, especially Deepseek. You can configure Deepseek's proxy with this link. Reddit visual guideline✨

Just a quick reminder—I’m not a native English speaker, so please feel free to let me know if you spot any mistakes! I’d love to learn and improve.

You can also take a look of my previous Twisted wonderland bots:

  • Sleeping beauty| Malleus Draconia| AU

  • Sleeping Beauty | Malleus Draconia | AU ALT
creator: Luthernis
